sentences.target: Mon compagnon rentre tard ce soir.

translations.fr: Mon compagnon rentre tard ce soir.
translations.en: My partner is coming home late tonight.
translations.es: Mi pareja llega tarde a casa esta noche.
translations.de: Mein Partner kommt heute Abend spät nach Hause.
translations.it: Il mio compagno rientra tardi stasera.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤 내 연인은 늦게 집에 와요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的伴侣今晚会晚点回家。
translations.yue: 我嘅伴侶今晚會遲啲返屋企。
translations.ru: Мой партнёр сегодня вечером вернётся домой поздно.
translations.pt: Meu parceiro vai chegar tarde hoje à noite.
translations.he: בן הזוג שלי יחזור הביתה מאוחר הערב.
translations.tr: Partnerim bu akşam geç eve geliyor.
translations.vi: Người yêu tôi tối nay về nhà muộn.
translations.ar: شريكي سيعود إلى المنزل متأخرًا هذا المساء.
translations.nl: Mijn partner komt vanavond laat thuis.
translations.uk: Мій партнер сьогодні ввечері пізно повернеться додому.
translations.hu: A párom ma este későn ér haza.
translations.hi: मेरा साथी आज रात देर से घर आएगा.
translations.pl: Mój partner wróci dziś wieczorem późno do domu.
translations.el: Ο σύντροφός μου θα γυρίσει αργά στο σπίτι απόψε.
translations.nb: Partneren min kommer hjem sent i kveld.
translations.id: Pasangan saya pulang terlambat malam ini.
translations.sv: Min partner kommer hem sent i kväll.
translations.ro: Partenerul meu ajunge acasă târziu în seara asta.
translations.cs: Můj partner přijde dnes večer domů pozdě.
translations.da: Min partner kommer hjem sent i aften.
translations.fi: Kumppanini tulee myöhään kotiin tänä iltana.
translations.ja: 私のパートナーは今夜遅く帰ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies the noun 'compagnon' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; agrees with the subject 'Mon compagnon'.
Adverb of time; modifies the verb 'rentre'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form the temporal phrase 'ce soir'.
Common noun, masculine singular; temporal complement (no preposition) forming 'ce soir'.

translations.en: Your partner is waiting for you outside.
translations.es: Tu pareja te está esperando afuera.
translations.de: Dein Partner wartet draußen auf dich.
translations.it: Il tuo compagno ti aspetta fuori.
translations.ko: 네 연인이 밖에서 너를 기다리고 있어요.
translations.ru: Твой партнёр ждёт тебя на улице.
translations.pt: Seu parceiro está esperando por você lá fora.
translations.he: בן הזוג שלך מחכה לך בחוץ.
translations.vi: Người yêu của bạn đang đợi bạn ở bên ngoài.
translations.nl: Je partner wacht buiten op je.
translations.uk: Твій партнер чекає на тебе на вулиці.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा साथी बाहर तुम्हारा इंतज़ार कर रहा है.
translations.pl: Twój partner czeka na ciebie na zewnątrz.
translations.el: Ο σύντροφός σου σε περιμένει έξω.
translations.nb: Partneren din venter på deg utenfor.
translations.sv: Din partner väntar på dig utanför.
translations.cs: Tvůj partner na tebe čeká venku.
translations.da: Din partner venter på dig udenfor.
translations.ja: あなたのパートナーが外で待っています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'compagnon' (subject).
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject noun phrase.
Clitic object pronoun (2nd person singular), elided before a vowel; direct object of 'attend'.
Main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; takes 't’' as its direct object.
Adverb of place; modifies the verb 'attend'.

sentences.target: Je présente mon compagnon à mes parents.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁezɑ̃t mɔ̃ kɔ̃paɲɔ̃ a me paʁɑ̃/

translations.fr: Je présente mon compagnon à mes parents.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁezɑ̃t mɔ̃ kɔ̃paɲɔ̃ a me paʁɑ̃/
translations.en: I'm introducing my partner to my parents.
translations.es: Presento a mi pareja a mis padres.
translations.de: Ich stelle meinen Partner meinen Eltern vor.
translations.it: Presento il mio compagno ai miei genitori.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把伴侣介绍给我的父母。
translations.yue: 我介紹我嘅伴侶畀我父母認識。
translations.ru: Я знакомлю своего партнёра со своими родителями.
translations.pt: Apresento meu parceiro aos meus pais.
translations.he: אני מציג את בן הזוג שלי להוריי.
translations.vi: Tôi giới thiệu người yêu của mình với bố mẹ.
translations.nl: Ik stel mijn partner aan mijn ouders voor.
translations.uk: Я знайомлю свого партнера зі своїми батьками.
translations.hi: मैं अपने साथी को अपने माता-पिता से मिलवा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Συστήνω τον σύντροφό μου στους γονείς μου.
translations.nb: Jeg introduserer partneren min for foreldrene mine.
translations.id: Saya mengenalkan pasangan saya kepada orang tua saya.
translations.sv: Jag presenterar min partner för mina föräldrar.
translations.da: Jeg introducerer min partner for mine forældre.
translations.ja: 私はパートナーを両親に紹介します。

tokens.explanation: Personal subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the sentence.
Main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; governs a direct object and an indirect object.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), masculine singular; modifies 'compagnon' (direct object).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'présente'.
Preposition; introduces the indirect object phrase 'mes parents'.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular), plural form; modifies 'parents'.
Common noun, plural; object of the preposition 'à' (indirect object).

sentences.target: On cherche un compagnon de voyage.

translations.fr: On cherche un compagnon de voyage.
translations.en: We're looking for a travel companion.
translations.es: Estamos buscando un compañero de viaje.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找一位旅行伙伴。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando um companheiro de viagem.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm một bạn đồng hành du lịch.
translations.hi: हम एक यात्रा साथी की तलाश कर रहे हैं.
translations.ja: 私たちは旅の仲間を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/personal subject pronoun; triggers 3rd person singular verb agreement.

Indefinite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition; introduces the noun complement 'voyage' forming a compound ('compagnon de voyage').
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of 'de' in the compound noun phrase.
